chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. No.D-1431 of 2021 _______________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge _______________________________________________________ 1.For order on office objection 2.For hearing of CMA No.6279/2021 3.For hearing of main case 19.01.2026 Mr. Muhammad Mustafa, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Dhani Bux Lashari, Advocate for SBCA. ------------------------- Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the respondent No.2 is raising an illegal construction on Plot No. B-10, measuring 2000 square yards, Bath Island, Karachi. He further submits that the petitioner in this regard also moved a complaint to the Respondent No.1, however, when no heed was paid, thereafter, instant petition has been preferred. Learned counsel for the respondent/SBCA submits that inspection will be carried out within one week and if found any violation, the same shall be demolished in accordance with law. In view of above, this petition is disposed of with directions to SBCA to take action against the illegal construction. The petitioner shall also be present alongwith the officials of the SBCA. Let a report be submitted in this regard by the SBCA to MIT-II of this court JUDGE JUDGE Aadil Arab
